next_step.observation: The bill note contains all required bill schema fields and two line items totaling 66 EUR.

function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.hearthline_epaper_panel
alias: hearthline_epaper_panel
purchased_on: 2025-11-28
total_eur: 66
counterparty: Pimoroni Europe SARL
project: Hearthline
related_entity: NORA
lines:
  - item: 7.5 inch e-paper panel
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 54
    line_eur: 54
  - item: mounting standoffs and acrylic sheet
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 12
    line_eur: 12
---
# Kitchen summary display parts

```text
+----------------+------------------------------+
| field          | value                        |
+----------------+------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                         |
| bill_id        | bill.hearthline_epaper_panel |
| alias          | hearthline_epaper_panel      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-11-28                   |
| total_eur      | 66                           |
| counterparty   | Pimoroni Europe SARL         |
| project        | Hearthline                   |
| related_entity | NORA                         |
+----------------+------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                 | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | 7.5 inch e-paper panel               | 1   | 54       | 54       |
| 2 | mounting standoffs and acrylic sheet | 1   | 12       | 12       |
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                                |     |          | 66       |
+---+--------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of the first Hearthline experiments for a calm kitchen-facing weekly view.

next_step.current_state: OCR migration write succeeded for the only NORA-related bill. Next required inbox workflow step is deleting processed inbox file (already read).

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox request, OCR'd all NORA-related bills (one match), deleted inbox item.

function.message: Completed. I reviewed the next inbox note and OCR-structured all bills related to NORA. One matching bill was found and migrated to YAML frontmatter while preserving the original note body: `50_finance/purchases/2025_11_28__eur_000066__bill__hearthline_epaper_panel.md`. The processed inbox item was then deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders, used finance schema for OCR migration, preserved original body text verbatim under frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after completion per inbox workflow.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request asked to OCR bills related to NORA. Search in `50_finance/purchases` for 'NORA' returned one exact match. That file contained complete visible bill data required by `finance-record-frontmatter.md`, so it was migrated to schema-compliant frontmatter with lines extracted from visible line items and original body retained exactly. No ambiguity remained.
completed_steps_laconic: write OCR frontmatter to target bill file
